name: alignment-helpers
description: Composable helpers, each useful on its own and each bound to the decisions ledger: the engineering loop (test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, code-review, verification-before-completion, branch-lifecycle), plus grounded-research (cite current sources, never stale memory), static-first-analysis (strongest deterministic signal before judgment), project-memory (durable facts), and learning-layer (senior-grade output while the operator levels up).
